name: Maronan Metals Limited
analysis: MMA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.4400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.4500, stop A$0.3416, target A$0.5200 (0.65:1) — then trail it.
